name: P90 | 牵引力
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been custom painted with sectioned blue hexagons designed to fit the P90's unique shape. Half the battle is keeping a hold of the weapon; the other half is hitting the target
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器上绘制了蓝色六边形涂装，图案为适用于 P90 而特别设计。 握紧武器是胜利的一半；击杀目标是另一半
